title: Dashboard displaying current stock levels, expiration warnings, and transfusion requests
description: The system shall display a digital dashboard that updates in real time showing current stock levels per ABO/Rh type, units nearing expiration, and open transfusion requests.
rationale: To provide blood bank managers with a quick visual overview of the blood bank's status to ensure timely management actions.
business_value: Improves operational efficiency by allowing managers to make informed decisions quickly based on up-to-date data.

source.description: As a blood bank manager I need a dashboard displaying current stock levels per ABO/Rh type, units nearing expiration, and open transfusion requests so that I can have a quick visual overview of blood bank status.

acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays current stock levels per ABO/Rh type.
Units nearing expiration are highlighted on the dashboard.
Open transfusion requests are listed on the dashboard.
preconditions: The blood bank has current inventory data.
Units nearing expiration have been identified in the inventory system.
There are open transfusion requests in the transfusion request system.
postconditions: The blood bank manager can access the dashboard from standard devices.
The dashboard is updated in real time with current stock levels, expiration warnings, and transfusion requests.
security_requirements: Data is securely transmitted between systems (inventory system, transfusion request system, dashboard).
Access to the dashboard is restricted to authorized blood bank managers.
User authentication mechanisms are in place to verify user identities.

non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system can handle up to 100 simultaneous users without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages are clear and actionable, with a user-friendly interface.

edge_cases: What happens when there is no inventory data available?
How does the system handle large volumes of transfusion requests?
What if a user tries to access the dashboard from an unauthorized device?

interfaces.name: Inventory API
interfaces.description: The system will consume data about current stock levels and expiration dates from this API.

interfaces.name: Transfusion Request API
interfaces.description: The system will consume data about open transfusion requests from this API.

interfaces.name: Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: This interface displays current stock levels, expiration warnings, and transfusion requests to the blood bank manager.

test_cases.description: Verify that the dashboard displays correct current stock levels per ABO/Rh type.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard shows accurate and up-to-date stock levels for all ABO/Rh types.

test_cases.description: Test expiration warning functionality on the dashboard.
test_cases.expected_result: Units nearing expiration are clearly highlighted with an appropriate visual indicator.

test_cases.description: Confirm that open transfusion requests are listed correctly on the dashboard.
test_cases.expected_result: All open transfusion requests are displayed in a clear and organized manner.

test_cases.description: Check access control for unauthorized users trying to access the dashboard.
test_cases.expected_result: Unauthorized users receive an appropriate error message or are denied access.
